events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: panelboard installation & makeup, rough-complete stage, observed field condition is "no panel schedule." NEC Art. 408 requires a panel schedule/directory. This is a defect. Work is roughly 70% complete until defects corrected. No panel schedule is a code violation (NEC 408.4 requires circuit directory). Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk: medium maybe. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: 70. Findings: no panel schedule/directory. Actions: create and post panel schedule. References: NEC Art. 408 (408.4), 110.26, 200.4.
